TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang R'ra' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 176 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 155 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na R'ra' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na R'ra' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na R'ra' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na R'ra' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na R'ra' hya' ga Oro'raw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč r Ēra Ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a oro Ēraw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang R'ra' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 176 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 155 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 21 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na R'ra' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na R'ra' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na R'ra' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na R'ra' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na R'ra' hya' ga Oro'raw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč r Ēra Ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na r Ēra Ē ńßja Ē …£a oro Ēraw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
